name: war-defense-pact
description: Costa Rica and Honduras have an active defense_pact treaty placed at T1. Guatemala declares war on Costa Rica at T2. Expected: at T2 tick resolution, the engine's declare_war action is processed, which adds an event log entry noting Guatemala declared war on Costa Rica. The defense pact auto-defense fires in the server runTick (not in the pure engine harness — this scenario validates the engine-side war declaration and event log only; the auto-defense is a server-side effect tested via the live stack). Harness validates: war declared event emitted, Costa Rica's war count = 1, Trust/treaty state unaffected.
